name: oci
description: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure management — Compute, OKE Kubernetes, Object Storage, and Compartments

tools.name: list_compartments
tools.description: List all compartments in the tenancy

tools.name: list_instances
tools.description: List compute instances in a compartment

tools.name: manage_instance
tools.description: Start, stop, or reset a compute instance

tools.name: list_oke_clusters
tools.description: List OKE (Kubernetes Engine) clusters in a compartment

tools.name: list_buckets
tools.description: List Object Storage buckets in a compartment

namespaceName.description: Object Storage namespace (leave empty to auto-detect)
